data.title: First Bancorp, parent company of First Bank, declares $0.23 per share cash dividend to be paid on Jan 25, 2026.
data.description: In Southern Pines, North Carolina, on December 12, 2025, the Board of Directors of First Bancorp (NASDAQ: FBNC), the company that owns First Bank, announced a cash dividend of $0.23 per share for its common stock. Shareholders as of a record date will receive the dividend payment on January 25, 2026.

data.title: AusperBio reports 30% functional cure rate in HBe-negative CHB patients on stable NA therapy.
data.description: In San Francisco on December 12, 2025, AusperBio Therapeutics, Inc. and Ausper Biopharma Co., Ltd. (collectively known as AusperBio) unveiled their joint efforts in developing oligonucleotide-based treatments for achieving a functional cure of chronic hepatitis B (CHB). The two companies, operating as a clinical-stage biotechnology firm, shared comprehensive details regarding their initiative.

data.title: NANO Nuclear to host Fiscal Year 2025 business update webcast on December 18, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. ET.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, NANO Nuclear Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: NNE) revealed plans to conduct its Fiscal Year 2025 business update webcast on December 18, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. ET. NANO Nuclear, a prominent company in advanced nuclear micro modular reactor technology for clean energy solutions, will host the webcast following the expected submission of its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year that concluded on September 30, 2025. This event signifies a significant step for the company as it looks to provide stakeholders with key insights and updates regarding its financial performance and strategic direction.

data.title: ECD Automotive Design to increase factory utilization by integrating production from a 4x4 restoration shop, allocating 10% of annual capacity.
data.description: The recent agreement involves the merging of production from a local 4x4 restoration shop into ECD's facility. ECD has committed to dedicating at least 10% of its annual production capacity to this program.

data.title: Vision's VSN token listed on Bitget for global expansion, supported by Bitpanda, aiming to bring Europe onchain.
data.description: Vienna, Dec. 12, 2025 - Vision, a project backed by Bitpanda and dedicated to integrating Europe into the blockchain system, has revealed the inclusion of its primary token, VSN, on the prominent global crypto platform Bitget. This move underscores Vision's ongoing global growth strategy and commitment to expanding its reach worldwide.

data.title: Ayar Labs and yieldWerx join forces to streamline photonics test data analytics, providing tangible results in 30 days.
data.description: In San Jose, California on December 12, 2025, Ayar Labs' engineering teams encountered difficulties processing and evaluating non-standard test data in electro-optical and final test flows as they worked towards meeting quick go-to-market deadlines. The teams were dealing with complex challenges as they attempted to scale their operations. They aimed to optimize their test analytics capabilities to effectively address these challenges.
International Organization for Migration: Sudan is facing the largest internal displacement crisis in the world

data.title: Arcfield's Orion Space Solutions wins SFA award for OrbitIQ™ at Spacepower Conference 2025, revolutionizing orbital modeling.
data.description: OrbitIQ™, developed by Arcfield's subsidiary Orion Space Solutions, has been honored for its groundbreaking work in orbital modeling, enhancing mission resilience, and furthering space superiority. The prestigious award was bestowed by the Space Force Association (SFA) on Dec. 12, 2025, in Chantilly, Virginia. This recognition highlights the significant impact that OrbitIQ™ has made in the industry, showcasing its capabilities in transforming orbital operations.

data.title: Subsea7 agrees to reimburse Siem Industries for legal costs related to proposed merger with Saipem. Reimbursement under $1 million.
data.description: Luxembourg – December 12, 2025 - Subsea 7 S.A. announced today that its Board of Directors has approved reimbursing Siem Industries S.A. for legal expenses linked to the potential merger of Subsea7 S.A. with Saipem S.p.A. The reimbursement amount is less than $1 million and pertains to legal services connected to the Shareholders’ Agreement dated July 23, 2025, among Eni S.p.A., CDP Equity S.p.A., and Siem Industries S.A., as well as ongoing assistance for the anti-trust process tied to the merger.

data.title: FDA considers rapid review for Eli Lilly's obesity pill as part of program to streamline review for public health needs.FDA may cut standard 60-day filing check to as little as one week for Lilly's drug as stated in internal documents.
data.description: The FDA is considering accelerating early-stage review steps for Eli Lilly and Co.'s experimental oral weight-loss treatment, orforglipron, as part of the National Priority Voucher program. This program, launched in June, aims to expedite decisions for products linked to important public-health or national-security needs. According to internal documents, the FDA Commissioner's Office is pushing to shorten the standard 60-day filing check - used to verify application completeness - to as little as one week for Lilly's drug and other products in a new expedited pathway. Despite pushback within the organization, the Commissioner's Office is determined to fast-track the review process. This news is available on Benzinga.com and involves Eli Lilly's stock (NYSE: LLY) and their innovative weight-loss drug that has shown promising results, reducing body weight by 29% and alleviating knee pain.

data.title: Terhi Launis, Aspocomp Group CFO, acquired shares on Dec 12, 2025, at 4:10 p.m Finnish time. Reference number: 133962/5/4.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, at 4:10 p.m. Finnish time, a management transaction took place at Aspocomp Group Plc involving Terhi Launis, the Chief Financial Officer. The transaction pertained to Aspocomp Group Plc with LEI 743700W8ZIJAMXWWWD26. This was an initial notification with reference number 133962/5/4.

data.title: Silynxcom secures $3M order for tactical communication solutions in Asian military tender, expands presence.
data.description: Part of a significant military contract, the order involves the Company's top in-ear headset as it extends operations in the region.

data.title: Lululemon reports Q3 earnings, beats estimates with $2.59 EPS and $2.57 billion revenue. Raises full-year guidance.
data.description: Athletic apparel company Lululemon Athletica Inc. (NASDAQ: LULU) exceeded expectations in the third quarter, reporting quarterly earnings of $2.59 per share, which surpassed the analyst estimate of $2.27 by 14.15%. Their quarterly revenue of $2.57 billion also outperformed the Street estimate of $2.48 billion, showing an increase from the $2.4 billion revenue reported in the same period last year. Additionally, Lululemon raised its fiscal 2025 GAAP EPS guidance to a range between $12.92 and $13.02, compared to the $12.95 analyst estimate. This positive news led to an optimistic outlook for the company's future.
